title: The Pactmaker (Origins)
description: Ever wanted to be a faustian bargain dealer in minecraft, no? too bad
body:
The Pact Maker
- 🟢 Offer: By holding a book you can extend an offer to another player, using a book they can accept or decline if they accept they are service to you in exchange for power.
- 🟢 Revoke: You can revoke the contract with any player you have bound.
- 🟢 Warp: You can teleport any of your bound players at will.
- 🟢 Call To Arms: You can teleport all of your bound players to your location.
- 🟢 Bound: Your bound players can not harm you.
- 🟢 Punish: You can damage your bound players if they disobey. 
- 🟡 Crown: You have a crown above your head.
- 🟡 Questionable Tangibility: You are constantly blinking in and out of existence.
- 🟡  Dealers Gambit: If you have at least one pact you are much stronger but if you have none you are much weaker.
- 🔴 Non Physical Body: You don't gain armour or armour toughness from armour.
- 🔴 Found Out: Wolfs and Iron Non-Physical see you for what you truly are and attack you on sight.
- 🔴 Nether Banished: Due to one of your deals backfiring in the past you constantly burn in the nether.
